```{r}
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"))



ggsave(love_plot, filename = here("output", "figures", "love_plot.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 12, height = 20)  
  

```



# Main analysis

## Table 1: Study characteristics

```{r}

Leicester_data |> 
  select(inclusion, sex, birth_year_cat, ethnicity_cohort, parental_education_cat, urban_rural, townsend_2001, townsend_2001_quintile, birth_order_cat, age_mother_delivery, smoking_mother_pregnancy, gestational_age, birth_weight, breast_feeding, smoking_others_ever, physical_activity_cat_minimal, fresh_fruit_cat_mean, vegetables_cat_mean, crisps_cat_mean, chocolate_cat_mean) |> 
  filter(inclusion == "included") |>
  select(-inclusion) |> 
  tbl_summary(missing = "always",
              by = "ethnicity_cohort",
                 type = list(all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical",
                             all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
                 statistic = list(all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
                                  "townsend_2001" ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
                               "age_mother_delivery" ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                               "gestational_age" ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                               "birth_weight" ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
                 digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                               all_continuous2() ~ 1),
                 missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})") |> 
  add_overall() |> 
  add_p(test = list("townsend_2001" ~ "wilcox.test",
                    "age_mother_delivery" ~ "t.test",
                    "gestational_age" ~ "t.test",
                    "birth_weight" ~ "t.test")) |> 
  modify_fmt_fun(
    p.value = function(x) {
      ifelse(
        x < 0.0001, 
        "<0.0001", 
        format(round(x, 4), nsmall = 4))  # Show 4 decimal places
    }
  )



```

### Alternative Table: By cohort number

```{r}

Leicester_data |> 
  select(inclusion, cohort_number, sex, ethnicity_cohort, parental_education_cat, urban_rural, townsend_2001, townsend_2001_quintile, smoking_mother_pregnancy, age_mother_delivery, gestational_age, term_birth, birth_weight, birth_order_cat, breast_feeding_duration, smoking_others_ever, physical_activity_cat_mean, fresh_fruit_cat_mean) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = cohort_number,
              type = c(all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical",
                       all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              digits = everything() ~ 0)

```

## Present BMI Trajectories

### eSupplement-Table 7: Summary of model fit

Write function to compare summary statistics of models.

```{r}
#| warning: false

summary_models <- function(models){
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Model = character(),
    G = integer(),
    npm = integer(),
    loglik = numeric(),
    BIC = numeric(),
    SABIC = numeric(),
    entropy = numeric(),
    class_percentages = character(),
    avg_post_prob = character(),
    prop_above_post_prob = character(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for (i in seq_along(models)) {
    model <- models[[i]]
    
    model_name <- names(models)[i]
    
    capture.output(suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(summary_stats <- summarytable(model, which = c("G", "loglik", "npm", "BIC", "SABIC", "entropy", "%class")))))
    
    class_cols <- grep("^%class", colnames(summary_stats), value = TRUE)
    
    class_percentages <- paste(round(summary_stats[, class_cols], 2), collapse = ", ")
    
    avg_post_prob <- c()
    
    if (summary_stats[,"G"] > 1){
      for (n_class in 1:summary_stats[,"G"]){
      
      capture.output(suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(avg_post_prob <- c(avg_post_prob,postprob(model, threshold = 0.7)[[2]][n_class, n_class]))))
      
      }
      
      capture.output(suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(prop_above_post_prob <- postprob(model, threshold = 0.7)[[3]]/100)))
    
    } else {
      avg_post_prob = 1
      prop_above_post_prob = 1
    }
    
    avg_post_prob <- paste(as.character(avg_post_prob), collapse = ", ")
    prop_above_post_prob <- paste(as.character(prop_above_post_prob), collapse = ", ")
    
    summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
      Model = model_name,
      G = summary_stats[,"G"],
      npm = summary_stats[,"npm"],
      loglik = summary_stats[,"loglik"],
      BIC = summary_stats[,"BIC"],
      SABIC = summary_stats[,"SABIC"],
      entropy = summary_stats[,"entropy"],
      class_percentages = class_percentages,
      avg_post_prob = avg_post_prob,
      prop_above_post_prob = prop_above_post_prob,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  return(summary_df)
}

two_knot_models_total <- c(bmi_models_total[1], bmi_models_total[3], bmi_models_total[5], bmi_models_total[7], bmi_models_total[9], bmi_models_total[11], bmi_models_total[13])

summary_models(two_knot_models_total)

```


### Alternative Table: Identified trajectories and number of participants

```{r}

Leicester_data |> select(class, ethnicity_cohort) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "ethnicity_cohort") |> 
  add_overall()

```


### Plot BMI trajectories

Functions

```{r}
#| warning: false

plot_hlme_model_bmi <- function(hlme_model, age = 18){

num_classes <- hlme_model$ng
num_subjects <- hlme_model$ns
  
data_predict <- data.frame(age_days = seq(14, trunc(age*365.25))) %>% 
  mutate(age_years = age_days/365.25)

predictions <- predictY(hlme_model, data_predict, var.time = "age_years", draws = TRUE)
  
data_predict <- data.frame(predictions[2], predictions[1])
  
if (num_classes == 1){
  data_predict <- data_predict %>% 
    rename("pred.Ypred_class1" = "pred.Ypred", "pred.lower.Ypred_class1" = "pred.lower.Ypred", "pred.upper.Ypred_class1" = "pred.upper.Ypred")
  
}

rename_columns <- setNames(
  paste0("pred.Ypred_class", 1:num_classes), 
  paste0("mean_class", 1:num_classes)
)
  
col_names <- names(data_predict)
  
for (i in 1:num_classes) {
    # Adjust column names based on the pattern in your `predictions`
    mean_col <- paste0("pred.Ypred_class", i)
    if (mean_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == mean_col)] <- paste0("mean_class", i)
    }
  }

for (i in 1:num_classes) {
    lower_col <- paste0("pred.lower.Ypred_class", i)
    upper_col <- paste0("pred.upper.Ypred_class", i)
    
    if (lower_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == lower_col)] <- paste0("lower_class", i)
    }
    
    if (upper_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == upper_col)] <- paste0("upper_class", i)
    }
  }

data_predict <- data_predict %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -age_years,
               names_to = c(".value", "class"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "value")

title <- paste0(num_classes, "-class model")

if (num_classes == 1){
  color_values = unibeSaphire()
}

if (num_classes == 2){
  color_values = c(unibeSaphire(), unibeApricot())
}

if (num_classes == 3){
  color_values = c(unibeSaphire(), unibeIce(), unibeRed())
}

if (num_classes == 4){
  color_values = c(unibeRed(), unibeIce(), unibeSaphire(), unibeApricot())
}

if (num_classes == 5){
  color_values = c(unibeMustard(), unibeIce(), unibeApricot(), unibeSaphire(), unibeRed())
}

if (num_classes == 6){
  color_values = c(unibeMint(), unibeRed(), unibeSaphire(), unibeIce(), unibeApricot(), unibeMustard())
}

if (num_classes == 7){
  color_values = c(unibeRed(), "#E93A1F", unibeApricot(), unibeIce(), unibeMint(), unibeSaphire(), unibeMustard())
}

if (num_subjects == 2661){
  color_values = c(unibeRed(), unibeIce(), unibeSaphire(), unibeMustard(), unibeApricot())
}

if (num_subjects == 2910){
  color_values = c(unibeRed(), unibeIce(), unibeMustard(), unibeSaphire(), unibeApricot())
}

if (num_subjects == 3871){
  color_values = c(unibeRed(), unibeMustard(), unibeIce(), unibeSaphire(), unibeApricot())
}

if (num_subjects == 1700){
  color_values = c(unibeApricot(), unibeRed(), unibeSaphire(), unibeMustard(), unibeIce())
}


plot_bmi_trajectories <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_ribbon(data = data_predict, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_predict, aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = color_values,
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = color_values,
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = (bquote(BMI~(kg/m^2))))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 18), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(0,5,10,15,18))+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 7),
        plot.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, r = 0.5, b = 1, unit = "cm"))

return(plot_bmi_trajectories)

}
```


Plot of predicted trajectories

```{r}
#| warning: false

best_model <- bmi_models_total[[9]]

plot_hlme_model_bmi(best_model)

```

#### Alternative Figure: BMI trajectories

Prepare BMI trajectory data

```{r}

data_predict <- data.frame(age_days = seq(0, trunc(18*365.25))) %>% 
  mutate(age_years = age_days/365.25)

predictions <- predictY(best_model, data_predict, var.time = "age_years", draws = TRUE)
  
data_predict <- data.frame(predictions[2], predictions[1])
  

rename_columns <- setNames(
  paste0("pred.Ypred_class", 1:5), 
  paste0("mean_class", 1:5)
)
  
col_names <- names(data_predict)
  
for (i in 1:5) {
    # Adjust column names based on the pattern in your `predictions`
    mean_col <- paste0("pred.Ypred_class", i)
    if (mean_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == mean_col)] <- paste0("mean_class", i)
    }
  }

for (i in 1:5) {
    lower_col <- paste0("pred.lower.Ypred_class", i)
    upper_col <- paste0("pred.upper.Ypred_class", i)
    
    if (lower_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == lower_col)] <- paste0("lower_class", i)
    }
    
    if (upper_col %in% col_names) {
      colnames(data_predict)[which(colnames(data_predict) == upper_col)] <- paste0("upper_class", i)
    }
  }

data_predict <- data_predict %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -age_years,
               names_to = c(".value", "class"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "value")

data_predict <- data_predict |> 
  mutate(class = factor(class, levels = c("class5", "class3", "class1", "class4", "class2"), labels = c("class5", "class3", "class1", "class4", "class2")))

```

Plot trajectories

```{r}

plot_bmi_trajectories <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.75, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_ribbon(data = data_predict, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_predict, aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = (bquote(BMI~(kg/m^2))))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 18), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(0,5,10,15,18))+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(15,20,25,30))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 8),
        plot.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, r = 0.5, b = 0, unit = "cm"))

plot_bmi_trajectories

ggsave(plot_bmi_trajectories, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_bmi_trajectories.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", height = 15, width = 16, bg = "white")

plot_legend <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_ribbon(data = data_predict, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_predict, aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = (bquote(Mean~BMI~(kg/m^2))))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(14/365.25, 18), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold", size = 8),
        legend.text = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", size = 8),
        legend.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, unit = "cm"),
        legend.box.spacing = unit(0.5,"cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.25, "cm"))

plot_legend <- get_legend(plot_legend) 

plot_legend

plot_bmi_trajectories_legend <- plot_grid(plot_bmi_trajectories, plot_legend, ncol=1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.5))

plot_bmi_trajectories_legend

ggsave(plot_bmi_trajectories_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_bmi_trajectories_legend.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 16, height = 14)


```


#### Figure 2: Observed vs. predicted trajectories

Prepare the observed data

```{r}

age_means <- Leicester_anthro_18 |> 
  mutate(age_group = ntile(age_years, 10)) |> 
  group_by(age_group) |> 
  summarise(mean_age = mean(age_years, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

bmi_summary <- Leicester_anthro_18 |> 
  left_join(Leicester_data |> select(serialno, class), by = "serialno") |> 
  mutate(age_group = ntile(age_years, 10)) |> 
  group_by(age_group, class) |> 
  summarise(
    mean_bmi = mean(bmi, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    sd_bmi = sd(bmi, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    se_bmi = sd_bmi / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower = mean_bmi - qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se_bmi,
    ci_upper = mean_bmi + qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se_bmi
  )

data_observed <- bmi_summary |> 
  left_join(age_means, by = "age_group") |> 
  mutate(class = factor(class, levels = c("Childhood onset obesity", "Adolescent onset overweight", "Early overweight resolving", "Stable normal BMI", "Persistent low BMI")))

```


```{r}
#| warning: false

plot_observed_bmi_trajectories <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.75, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_point(data = data_observed, mapping = aes(x = mean_age, y = mean_bmi, color = class))+
  geom_errorbar(data = data_observed, mapping = aes(x = mean_age, ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper, color = class))+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Observed BMI",
                    values = c("Childhood onset obesity" = unibeRed(),
                               "Adolescent onset overweight" = unibeApricot(),
                               "Early overweight resolving" = unibeMustard(),
                               "Stable normal BMI" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "Persistent low BMI" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("Childhood onset obesity" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "Adolescent onset overweight" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "Early overweight resolving" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "Stalbe normal BMI" = "Stalbe normal BMI",
                               "Persistent low BMI" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_ribbon(data = data_predict, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_predict, aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Predicted BMI Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 3)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Predicted BMI Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 3)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = (bquote(BMI~(kg/m^2))))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 18), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(0,5,10,15,18))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(12, 31), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(15,20,25,30))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 8),
        plot.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, b = 1, unit = "cm"))

plot_observed_bmi_trajectories

ggsave(plot_observed_bmi_trajectories, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_observed_bmi_trajectories.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", height = 15, width = 16, bg = "white")

plot_legend_observed <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_point(data = data_observed, mapping = aes(x = mean_age, y = mean_bmi, color = class))+
  geom_errorbar(data = data_observed, mapping = aes(x = mean_age, ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper, color = class))+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Observed BMI",
                    values = c("Childhood onset obesity" = unibeRed(),
                               "Adolescent onset overweight" = unibeApricot(),
                               "Early overweight resolving" = unibeMustard(),
                               "Stable normal BMI" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "Persistent low BMI" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("Childhood onset obesity" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "Adolescent onset overweight" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "Early overweight resolving" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "Stable normal BMI" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "Persistent low BMI" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 5)) +
  new_scale_color()+
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_ribbon(data = data_predict, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_predict, aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Predicted BMI Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 3, nrow = 5)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Predicted BMI Trajectories",
                    values = c("class5" = unibeRed(),
                               "class3" = unibeApricot(),
                               "class1" = unibeMustard(),
                               "class4" = unibeSaphire(),
                               "class2" = unibeIce()),
                    labels = c("class5" = "Childhood onset obesity",
                               "class3" = "Adolescent onset overweight",
                               "class1" = "Early overweight resolving",
                               "class4" = "Stable normal BMI",
                               "class2" = "Persistent low BMI"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 3, nrow = 5)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = (bquote(Mean~BMI~(kg/m^2))))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(14/365.25, 18), expand = c(0,0), )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold", size = 8),
        legend.text = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", size = 8),
        legend.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, unit = "cm"),
        legend.box.spacing = unit(0.5,"cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.25, "cm"),
        legend.box = "horizontal")

plot_legend_observed <- get_legend(plot_legend_observed) 

plot_legend_observed

plot_observed_bmi_trajectories_legend <- plot_grid(plot_observed_bmi_trajectories, plot_legend_observed, ncol=1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.15))

plot_observed_bmi_trajectories_legend

ggsave(plot_observed_bmi_trajectories_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_observed_bmi_trajectories_legend.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 16, height = 14)
  

```




#### eSupplement Figure 3: Female vs. Male / White vs. South Asian

```{r}
#| warning: false

plot_females <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_female[[9]])
plot_females

plot_males <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_male[[9]])
plot_males

plot_europe <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_europe[[9]])
plot_europe

plot_asia <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_asia[[9]])
plot_asia

plot_5_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[9]])
plot_5_class

plot_legend_models <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold", size = 8),
        legend.text = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", size = 8),
        legend.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, unit = "cm"),
        legend.box.spacing = unit(0.5,"cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.25, "cm"))

legend_models <- get_legend(plot_legend_models) 

plot_female_male_european_asian <- plot_grid(plot_females, plot_males, plot_europe, plot_asia, plot_5_class, legend_models,
                         ncol = 2,
                         labels = c("Female ", "Male ", "White", "South Asian", "Combined", ""),
                         label_x = c(0.12, 0.12, 0.12, 0.12, 0.12),
                         hjust = c(0,0,0,0,0),
                         label_size = 12) + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0.5, unit = "cm"))

plot_female_male_european_asian

ggsave(plot_female_male_european_asian, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_female_male_european_asian.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 16, height = 18)

```



#### eSupplement Figure 4: All 7 models

```{r}
#| warning: false

plot_1_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[1]])
plot_1_class

plot_2_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[3]])
plot_2_class

plot_3_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[5]])
plot_3_class

plot_4_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[7]])
plot_4_class

plot_5_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[9]])
plot_5_class

plot_6_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[11]])
plot_6_class

plot_7_class <- plot_hlme_model_bmi(bmi_models_total[[13]])
plot_7_class

plot_legend_models <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = class), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = data_bmi_reference, mapping = aes(x = age_years, y = mean, color = class), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "grey5",
                               "overweight" = "grey40",
                               "50th percentile" = "NA",
                               "underweight" = "grey80"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "UK-WHO growth charts",
                    values = c("obesity" = "NA",
                               "overweight" = "NA",
                               "50th percentile" = "black",
                               "underweight" = "NA"),
                    labels = c("obesity" = "Obesity above 98<sup>th</sup> centile",
                                "overweight" = "Overweight above 91<sup>st</sup> centile",
                               "50th percentile" = "50<sup>th</sup> centile",
                               "underweight" = "Underweight below 2<sup>nd</sup> centile"),
                    guide = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold", size = 8),
        legend.text = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", size = 8),
        legend.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0, unit = "cm"),
        legend.box.spacing = unit(0.5,"cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.25, "cm"))

legend_models <- get_legend(plot_legend_models) 

plot_models <- plot_grid(plot_1_class, plot_2_class, plot_3_class, plot_4_class, plot_5_class, plot_6_class, plot_7_class, legend_models,
                         ncol = 2,
                         labels = c(" 1 class ", "2 classes", "3 classes", "4 classes", "5 classes", "6 classes", "7 classes", ""),
                         label_size = 12)

plot_models

ggsave(plot_models, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_models.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 16, height = 23)

```




## Characterize BMI Trajectories

### Table 2: Participants' characteristics across trajectories

```{r}
#| warning: false

Leicester_data |> 
  select(class, sex, birth_year_cat, ethnicity_cohort, parental_education_cat, urban_rural, townsend_2001, townsend_2001_quintile, birth_order_cat, smoking_mother_pregnancy, age_mother_delivery, gestational_age, birth_weight, breast_feeding_duration, smoking_others_ever, physical_activity_cat_mean, fresh_fruit_cat_mean, vegetables_cat_mean, crisps_cat_mean, chocolate_cat_mean) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = class,
              missing = "always",
                 type = list(all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical",
                             all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
                 statistic = list(all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
                                  "townsend_2001" ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
                               "age_mother_delivery" ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                               "gestational_age" ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                               "birth_weight" ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
                 digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0),
                 missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})") |> 
  add_p(test = list("townsend_2001" ~ "kruskal.test",
                    "age_mother_delivery" ~ "oneway.test",
                    "gestational_age" ~ "oneway.test",
                    "birth_weight" ~ "oneway.test")) |> 
  modify_fmt_fun(
    p.value = function(x) {
      ifelse(
        x < 0.0001, 
        "<0.0001", 
        format(round(x, 4), nsmall = 4))  # Show 4 decimal places
    }
  )


```


## Associated groups and factors: multinomial regression

### Integrate GBTM uncertainty

We cannot classify the participants with 100% certainty into the various trajectories. We take that into account by using the posterior probabilities as weights in the multinomial logistic regression.

```{r}

long_data <- Leicester_data_weighted |>
  filter(is.na(class)==FALSE) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("prob"),
    names_to = "latent_class",
    values_to = "uncertainty_weight"
  )

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(latent_class = factor(latent_class, levels = c("prob4", "prob2", "prob1",  "prob5",  "prob3"), labels = c("Stable normal BMI", "Persistent low BMI", "Early overweight resolving",  "Childhood onset obesity", "Adolescent onset overweight")),
         latent_class = relevel(latent_class, ref = "Stable normal BMI"))

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(total_weight = ipweight_stabilized*uncertainty_weight)

```

### eTable 8: Univariable, unadjusted

#### Sociodemographic

sex

```{r}

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ sex, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_sex <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_sex

```



Birth year

```{r}
#| warning: false

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(birth_year_cat = factor(birth_year_cat,
                                 levels = c("1993-1997", "1985-1989")))

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ birth_year_cat, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_birth_year <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_birth_year

```

Ethnicity

```{r}
#| warning: false

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ ethnicity_cohort, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary



table_summary_ethnicity <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_ethnicity

```

Parental education

```{r}
#| warning: false

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(parental_education_cat = case_when(parental_education_cat=="unkown" ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ parental_education_cat))


model <- multinom(latent_class ~ parental_education_cat, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_parental_education <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_parental_education

```


Urbanization

```{r}

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ urban_rural, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_urban_rural <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_urban_rural


```


Townsend 

```{r}
#| warning: false

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(townsend_2001_quintile = factor(townsend_2001_quintile, levels = c(1,2,3,4,5)))


model_t1 <- multinom(latent_class ~ townsend_2001_quintile, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model_t1, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

model_t2 <- multinom(latent_class ~ townsend_2001, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model_t2, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

model_t3 <- multinom(latent_class ~ townsend_2001 + I(townsend_2001^2), data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model_t3, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

AIC(model_t1, model_t2, model_t3)
BIC(model_t1, model_t2, model_t3)

model_t1 <- multinom(latent_class ~ townsend_2001_quintile, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model_t1, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_townsend <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_townsend






```




#### Perinatal

Birth order

```{r}



model <- multinom(latent_class ~ birth_order_cat, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_birth_order <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_birth_order

```



Age mother birth

```{r}
#| warning: false

Leicester_data_weighted |>
  filter(!is.na(class)) |>
  summarize(
    sd_val = sqrt(wtd.var(age_mother_delivery, weights = ipweight_stabilized, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) |>
  pull(sd_val)

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ scale(age_mother_delivery), data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_age_mother <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_age_mother

```


Gestational age

```{r}
#| warning: false

Leicester_data_weighted |>
  filter(!is.na(class)) |>
  summarize(
    sd_val = sqrt(wtd.var(gestational_age, weights = ipweight_stabilized, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) |>
  pull(sd_val)

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ scale(gestational_age), data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_gestational_age <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_gestational_age

```

Birth_weight

```{r}
#| warning: false

Leicester_data_weighted |>
  filter(!is.na(class)) |>
  summarize(
    sd_val = sqrt(wtd.var(birth_weight, weights = ipweight_stabilized, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) |>
  pull(sd_val)

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ scale(birth_weight), data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_birth_weight <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_birth_weight

```

#### Lifestyle 

Smoking pregnancy

```{r}
#| warning: false



model <- multinom(latent_class ~ smoking_mother_pregnancy, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_smoking_pregnancy <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_smoking_pregnancy

```

Breast feeding

```{r}
#| warning: false

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ breast_feeding, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_breast_feeding <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_breast_feeding

```





Second hand smoke

```{r}
#| warning: false


model <- multinom(latent_class ~ smoking_others_ever, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_smoking_others_ever <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_smoking_others_ever

```


Vigorous physical activity

```{r}
#| warning: false

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ physical_activity_cat_minimal, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_physical_activity <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_summary_physical_activity

```

#### Diet composition

Fresh fruit

```{r}
#| warning: false


long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(fresh_fruit = factor(fresh_fruit_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))


model <- multinom(latent_class ~ fresh_fruit, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_fresh_fruit <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  ) |> filter(term == "fresh_fruitless than once daily")

table_summary_fresh_fruit


model_summary_fresh_fruit <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  filter(term == "fresh_fruitless than once daily") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)

```

Vegetables

```{r}
#| warning: false


long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(vegetables = factor(vegetables_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))


model <- multinom(latent_class ~ vegetables, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_vegetables <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  ) |> filter(term == "vegetablesless than once daily")

table_summary_vegetables


model_summary_vegetables <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  filter(term == "vegetablesless than once daily") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)

```



Crisps

```{r}
#| warning: false

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(crisps = factor(crisps_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ crisps, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_crisps <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  ) |> filter(term == "crispsless than once daily")

table_summary_crisps


model_summary_crisps <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  filter(term == "crispsless than once daily") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)

```



Chocolates

```{r}
#| warning: false


long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(chocolates = factor(chocolate_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))



model <- multinom(latent_class ~ chocolates, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_summary_chocolates <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  ) |> filter(term == "chocolatesless than once daily")

table_summary_chocolates


model_summary_chocolates <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  filter(term == "chocolatesless than once daily") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)

```







#### Combined table

```{r}

table_multinomial_regression_univariable <- table_summary_sex |> 
    bind_rows(table_summary_birth_year, table_summary_ethnicity, table_summary_parental_education, table_summary_urban_rural, table_summary_townsend, 
              table_summary_birth_order, table_summary_age_mother, table_summary_smoking_pregnancy, table_summary_gestational_age, table_summary_birth_weight, table_summary_breast_feeding,
              table_summary_smoking_others_ever, table_summary_physical_activity, table_summary_fresh_fruit, table_summary_vegetables, table_summary_crisps, table_summary_chocolates)

```


### eTable 9: At-risk groups: adjusted sociodemographics and perinatal


```{r}

cat("number of participants:", Leicester_data |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(ethnicity_cohort) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight)) |> nrow())

Leicester_data |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(ethnicity_cohort) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight)) |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ sex + birth_year_cat + ethnicity_cohort + parental_education_cat + urban_rural + townsend_2001_quintile + birth_order_cat + I(scale(age_mother_delivery)) + I(scale(gestational_age)) + I(scale(birth_weight)), data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_multinomial_regression_at_risk <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_multinomial_regression_at_risk


model_summary_at_risk <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)


```


### Figure 3: At-risk groups

Prepare data for forrest plot

```{r}

# combine model summaries
table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk <- model_summary_at_risk


```



```{r}

table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |> 
  mutate(term = case_when(term == "sexfemale" ~ "Female",
                          term == "birth_year_cat1985-1989" ~ "'1985–1989'",
                          term == "ethnicity_cohortSouth Asian" ~ "'South Asian'",
                          term == "urban_ruralrural" ~ "'Suburbs and rural'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile2" ~ "'Quintile 2'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile3" ~ "'Quintile 3'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile4" ~ "'Quintile 4'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile5" ~ "'Quintile 5'",
                          term == "parental_education_catfurther education" ~ "Further",
                          term == "parental_education_cathigher education" ~ "Higher",
                          term == "I(scale(age_mother_delivery))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'",
                          term == "I(scale(gestational_age))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'",
                          term == "I(scale(birth_weight))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'",
                          term == "birth_order_catsecond child" ~ "'Second child'",
                          term == "birth_order_catthird or later child" ~ "'Third or later child'"))

table_regression_reference <- data.frame(class = c("variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable"),
                                         term = c("bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'",
                                                  "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'",
                                                  "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'",
                                                  "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'",
                                                  "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'",
                                                  "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'",
                                                  
                                                  "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'",
                                                  "bold('Age of mother at birth')",
                                                  "bold('Gestational age')",
                                                  "bold('Birth weight')"),
                                         aOR = 1,
                                         lower_ci = NA,
                                         upper_ci = NA)

table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |> 
  bind_rows(table_regression_reference) |> 
mutate(term = factor(term,
                     levels = c(
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'",
                       "bold('Birth weight')",
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'",
                       "bold('Gestational age')",
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'",
                       "bold('Age of mother at birth')",
                       "'Third or later child'",
                       "'Second child'",
                       "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'",
                       
                       "'Quintile 5'",
                       "'Quintile 4'",
                       "'Quintile 3'",
                       "'Quintile 2'",
                       "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'",
                       "'Suburbs and rural'",
                       "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'",
                       "Higher",
                       "Further",
                       "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'",
                       "'South Asian'",
                       "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'",
                       "'1985–1989'",
                       "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'",
                       "Female",
                       "bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'"
                     ))) |> 
  mutate(group = case_when(term == "bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Female"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'1985–1989'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'South Asian'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Suburbs and rural'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 2'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 3'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 4'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 5'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Further"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Higher"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Age of mother at birth')"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Gestational age')"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Birth weight')" ~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'" ~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Second child'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Third or later child'"~ "Birth related")) |> 
  mutate(hide = factor(case_when(class == "reference" | class == "variable" ~ "Yes",
                          TRUE ~ "No"), levels = c("Yes", "No")))
  

table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |> 
  mutate(transparency = case_when(term == "bold('Age of mother at birth')" ~ "transparent",
                                  term == "bold('Gestational age')" ~ "transparent",
                                  term == "bold('Birth weight')" ~ "transparent",
                                  TRUE ~ "normal"))

```

#### Plot by trajectory

```{r}

plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |>
  filter(class == "Persistent low BMI" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency), size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeIce()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeIce()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal


plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |>
  filter(class == "Early overweight resolving" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeMustard()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeMustard()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight


plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |>
  filter(class == "Childhood onset obesity" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeRed()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeRed()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity

plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |>
  filter(class == "Adolescent onset overweight" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeApricot()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeApricot()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight



y_axis_plot <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_at_risk |>
  filter(class == "Childhood onset obesity" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, y = term)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), alpha = 0) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(l = 0.25, b = 0, t = 0, r = 0, unit = "cm"))

y_axis_plot


plot_forrest_multinomial_at_risk <- plot_grid(y_axis_plot,
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      ncol = 5,
                                      align = "h",
                                      labels = c(" ", "Persistent low BMI", "Early overweight resolving", "Childhood onset obesity", "Adolescent onset overweight"),
                                      label_size = 10,
                                      label_x = 0.5,
                                      hjust = 0.5)

ggsave(plot_forrest_multinomial_at_risk, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_forrest_multinomial_at_risk.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 28, height = 11.5)


```


### eTable 10: Risk factors: fully adjusted


```{r}

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(breast_feeding = factor(breast_feeding,
                                             levels = c("yes", "no")))

long_data <- long_data |> 
  mutate(fresh_fruit = factor(fresh_fruit_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))

cat("number of participants:", Leicester_data |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(ethnicity_cohort) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(smoking_mother_pregnancy) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> nrow())

Leicester_data |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(ethnicity_cohort) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(smoking_mother_pregnancy) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ sex + birth_year_cat + ethnicity_cohort + parental_education_cat + urban_rural + townsend_2001_quintile + birth_order_cat + I(scale(age_mother_delivery)) + I(scale(gestational_age)) + I(scale(birth_weight)) + smoking_mother_pregnancy + breast_feeding + smoking_others_ever + physical_activity_cat_minimal + fresh_fruit, data = long_data, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2), "–", format(round2(`conf.high`, 2), nsmall=2), "]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors


model_summary_risk_factors <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)


```

### Figure 4: Risk factors

Prepare data for forrest plot

```{r}

# combine model summaries
table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors <- model_summary_risk_factors


```



```{r}

table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |> 
  mutate(term = case_when(term == "sexfemale" ~ "Female",
                          term == "birth_year_cat1985-1989" ~ "'1985–1989'",
                          term == "ethnicity_cohortSouth Asian" ~ "'South Asian'",
                          term == "urban_ruralrural" ~ "'Suburbs and rural'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile2" ~ "'Quintile 2'",
```
