```{r}
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile3" ~ "'Quintile 3'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile4" ~ "'Quintile 4'",
                          term == "townsend_2001_quintile5" ~ "'Quintile 5'",
                          term == "parental_education_catfurther education" ~ "Further",
                          term == "parental_education_cathigher education" ~ "Higher",
                          term == "I(scale(age_mother_delivery))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'",
                          term == "I(scale(gestational_age))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'",
                          term == "I(scale(birth_weight))" ~ "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'",
                          term == "birth_order_catsecond child" ~ "'Second child'",
                          term == "birth_order_catthird or later child" ~ "'Third or later child'",
                          term == "smoking_mother_pregnancyyes" ~ "Yes",
                          term == "breast_feedingno" ~ "No",
                          term == "physical_activity_cat_minimal>= 4 hrs per week" ~ "'≥4 hrs/week'",
                          term == "fresh_fruitless than once daily" ~ "'Less than once daily'",
                          term == "smoking_others_everyes" ~ "' Yes'"))

table_regression_reference <- data.frame(class = c("variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable",
                                                   "variable"),
                                         term = c("bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'",
                                                  "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'",
                                                  "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'",
                                                  "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'",
                                                  "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'",
                                                  "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'",
                                                  
                                                  "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'",
                                                  "bold('Age of mother at birth')",
                                                  "bold('Gestational age')",
                                                  "bold('Birth weight')",
                                                  
                                                  "bold('Smoking during pregnancy')*', ref: No'",
                                                  "bold(Breastfeeding)*', ref: Yes'",
                                                  "bold('Secondhand tobacco smoke')*', ref: No'",
                                                  "bold('Physical activity')*', ref: 0–3 hrs/week'",
                                                  "bold('Fresh fruit intake')*', ref: Once daily or more'"),
                                         aOR = 1,
                                         lower_ci = NA,
                                         upper_ci = NA)

table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |> 
  bind_rows(table_regression_reference) |> 
mutate(term = factor(term,
                     levels = c(
                       "'Less than once daily'",
                       "bold('Fresh fruit intake')*', ref: Once daily or more'",
                       "'≥4 hrs/week'",
                       "bold('Physical activity')*', ref: 0–3 hrs/week'",
                       "' Yes'",
                       "bold('Secondhand tobacco smoke')*', ref: No'",
                       "No",
                       "bold(Breastfeeding)*', ref: Yes'",
                       "Yes",
                       "bold('Smoking during pregnancy')*', ref: No'",
                       
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'",
                       "bold('Birth weight')",
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'",
                       "bold('Gestational age')",
                       "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'",
                       "bold('Age of mother at birth')",
                       "'Third or later child'",
                       "'Second child'",
                       "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'",
                       
                       "'Quintile 5'",
                       "'Quintile 4'",
                       "'Quintile 3'",
                       "'Quintile 2'",
                       "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'",
                       "'Suburbs and rural'",
                       "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'",
                       "Higher",
                       "Further",
                       "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'",
                       "'South Asian'",
                       "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'",
                       "'1985–1989'",
                       "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'",
                       "Female",
                       "bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'"
                     ))) |> 
  mutate(group = case_when(term == "bold(Sex)*', ref: Male'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Female"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Birth year')*', ref: 1993–1997'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'1985–1989'" ~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold(Ethnicity)*', ref: White'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'South Asian'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Degree of urbanization')*', ref: Inner city'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Suburbs and rural'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Townsend index')*', ref: Quintile 1'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 2'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 3'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 4'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "'Quintile 5'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Parental education')*', ref: Compulsory'"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Further"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "Higher"~ "Sociodemographic",
                           term == "bold('Smoking during pregnancy')*', ref: No'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "Yes"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Age of mother at birth')"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 5.3 years'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Gestational age')"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 1.9 weeks'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Birth weight')" ~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Per 1 SD increase: 566 grams'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Birth order')*', ref: First child'" ~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Second child'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "'Third or later child'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold(Breastfeeding)*', ref: Yes'"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "No"~ "Birth related",
                           term == "bold('Secondhand tobacco smoke')*', ref: No'" ~ "Lifestyle",
                           term == "' Yes'" ~ "Lifestyle",
                           term == "bold('Physical activity')*', ref: 0–3 hrs/week'" ~ "Lifestyle",
                           term == "'≥4 hrs/week'" ~ "Lifestyle",
                           term == "bold('Fresh fruit intake')*', ref: Once daily or more'" ~ "Lifestyle",
                           term == "'Less than once daily'" ~ "Lifestyle")) |> 
  mutate(hide = factor(case_when(class == "reference" | class == "variable" ~ "Yes",
                          TRUE ~ "No"), levels = c("Yes", "No")))
  

table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |> 
  mutate(transparency = case_when(term == "bold('Age of mother at birth')" ~ "transparent",
                                  term == "bold('Gestational age')" ~ "transparent",
                                  term == "bold('Birth weight')" ~ "transparent",
                                  TRUE ~ "normal"))

```

#### Plot by trajectory

```{r}

plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |>
  filter(class == "Persistent low BMI" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency), size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeIce()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeIce()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal


plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |>
  filter(class == "Early overweight resolving" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeMustard()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeMustard()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight


plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |>
  filter(class == "Childhood onset obesity" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeRed()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeRed()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity

plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |>
  filter(class == "Adolescent onset overweight" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = aOR, y = term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = transparency),size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), colour = unibeApricot()) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci),
                 height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.25,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 1),
                 colour = unibeApricot()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4), transform = "log", expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.25, 4), expand = FALSE, clip = "on")+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_alpha_manual(breaks = c("transparent", "normal"), values = c(0, 100), guide = "none")+
  labs(x = "**aOR** (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black", margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.75, r = 0.7, l = 0.4, b = 0.5, unit = "cm"))
    


plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight



y_axis_plot <- table_plot_multinomial_regression_risk_factors |>
  filter(class == "Childhood onset obesity" | class == "variable") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, y = term)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 1), alpha = 0) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = x), expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(l = 0.25, b = 0, t = 0, r = 0, unit = "cm"))

y_axis_plot


plot_forrest_multinomial_risk_factors <- plot_grid(y_axis_plot,
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_below_normal + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_early_overweight + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_school_obesity + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      plot_forrest_multinomial_adolescent_overweight + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()),
                                      ncol = 5,
                                      align = "h",
                                      labels = c(" ", "Persistent low BMI", "Early overweight resolving", "Childhood onset obesity", "Adolescent onset overweight"),
                                      label_size = 10,
                                      label_x = 0.5,
                                      hjust = 0.5)

ggsave(plot_forrest_multinomial_risk_factors, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_forrest_multinomial_risk_factors.svg"), device = "svg", units = "cm", bg = "white", width = 28, height = 17.5)


```




### eTable 11 & 12: Stratified by ethnicity


#### South Asians

```{r}

long_data_asians <- long_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "South Asian")

Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "South Asian") |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()


```


```{r}

long_data_asians <- long_data_asians |> 
  mutate(parental_education_cat = factor(parental_education_cat,
                                             levels = c("higher education", "further education", "compulsory education")))

long_data_asians <- long_data_asians |> 
  mutate(townsend_2001_quintile = factor(townsend_2001_quintile,
                                             levels = c("5", "4", "3", "2", "1")))


long_data_asians <- long_data_asians |> 
  mutate(fresh_fruit = factor(fresh_fruit_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))

cat("number of participants:", Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "South Asian") |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> nrow())

Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "South Asian") |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ sex + parental_education_cat + townsend_2001_quintile + birth_order_cat + I(scale(age_mother_delivery)) + I(scale(gestational_age)) + I(scale(birth_weight)) + breast_feeding + smoking_others_ever + physical_activity_cat_minimal + fresh_fruit, data = long_data_asians, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors_SA <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2),"–",format(round2(`conf.high`,2),nsmall=2),"]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors_SA


model_summary_risk_factors_SA <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)


```
#### Whites

```{r}

long_data_whites <- long_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "White")

Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "White") |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()


```


```{r}

long_data_whites <- long_data_whites |> 
  mutate(fresh_fruit = factor(fresh_fruit_cat_mean,
                              levels = c("Once daily or more", "less than once daily")))



cat("number of participants:", Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "White") |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(smoking_mother_pregnancy) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> nrow())

Leicester_data |> filter(ethnicity_cohort == "White") |> filter(!is.na(class) & !is.na(birth_year_cat) & !is.na(parental_education_cat) & !is.na(urban_rural) & !is.na(townsend_2001_quintile) & !is.na(birth_order_cat) & !is.na(age_mother_delivery) & !is.na(gestational_age) & !is.na(birth_weight) & !is.na(smoking_mother_pregnancy) & !is.na(breast_feeding) & !is.na(smoking_others_ever) & !is.na(physical_activity_cat_minimal) & !is.na(fresh_fruit_cat)) |> select(class) |> tbl_summary()

model <- multinom(latent_class ~ sex + birth_year_cat + parental_education_cat + urban_rural + townsend_2001_quintile + birth_order_cat + I(scale(age_mother_delivery)) + I(scale(gestational_age)) + I(scale(birth_weight)) + smoking_mother_pregnancy + breast_feeding + smoking_others_ever + physical_activity_cat_minimal + fresh_fruit, data = long_data_whites, weights = total_weight)
model_summary <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
model_summary

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors_WH <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(`OR [95% CI]` = paste0(round2(estimate, 2), " [", format(round2(`conf.low`, 2), nsmall=2),"–",format(round2(`conf.high`,2),nsmall=2),"]")) |> 
  select(`y.level`, `term`, `OR [95% CI]`) |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = y.level,
    values_from = `OR [95% CI]` 
  )

table_multinomial_regression_risk_factors_WH


model_summary_risk_factors_WH <- model_summary |> 
  filter(term !="(Intercept)") |> 
  mutate(aOR = estimate,
         lower_ci = conf.low,
         upper_ci = conf.high,
         class = y.level) |> 
  select(class, term, aOR, lower_ci, upper_ci)


```
